title: Breadmaker Album - Point Blank
description: A content pack for Vic's Point Blank featuring high quality animations and total close range domination.
body:
A content pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds guns on the simpler side compared to other content packs, but has higher quality animations than the rest. Models don't look that good, but it sure feels good.

Currently contains 13 guns (Including variations of different guns).      


If there are any issues or any suggestions, tell me them in the comments or ping me in the official Point Blank discord server.       

This is not a datapack in the form you think it is, it is a content pack for a mod named Vic's Point Blank. It is to add extra weapons to the base mod similar to that of Crayfish's Gun Mod, read below for the tutorial for installation.

How to install:
1. Download the pack
2. Locate to the folder of the version you are playing on
3. Make a folder and name it "pointblank"
4. Paste the pack in and make sure you have VPB installed



Loader compatibility :
Forge, Neoforge, Fabric
